name: Old-Fashioned Pear Conserve
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half of the pears in a food processor bowl or 5 cup blender container.
2. Process until finely chopped (1 to 2 minutes).
3. Transfer the chopped pears to a Dutch oven.
4. Repeat with the remaining pears.
5. Stir in all remaining ingredients.
6. Cook over medium heat until the pears are very soft and the mixture thickens (30 to 40 minutes).
7. Serve warm or cold on pancakes, waffles, toast, or warm breads.
8. Store refrigerated. Yield: 2 - 1/2 cups.
